title: Pass 5.B.1: ferrotorch-distributions transforms.rs unconditional CPU readback (5 sites)
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-distributions audit, GPU_CPU_MISMATCH bucket (5 findings).

Every `Transform` impl unconditionally calls `data_vec()` then `TensorStorage::cpu(...)`; result tensor is CPU regardless of input device. `TransformedDistribution::log_prob` (transforms.rs:473-505) loses CUDA placement entirely. Same shape in dirichlet.rs (5 sites at lines 147-152, 195-200, 254-259, 271-280, 297-307, 336-341) and multivariate_normal.rs (140-177, 179-228, 482-511).

Acceptance:
- Migrate transforms to device-resident ops (no `data_vec()`), OR
- Gate by `is_cuda()` and Err with NotImplementedOnCuda matching the rest of the crate (see fallback.rs:115-202 pattern)
- Discriminating test that asserts result.is_cuda() when input.is_cuda().
